Frankly, nobody cares that you studied your whole life, or even if you did two life-times. The fact remains, there is no scholar who properly adheres to the correct Aqeedah in belief, action, and fatwa  except they will be targeted, silenced, imprisoned, killed, or at the very least labeled an enemy of the state, albeit ideologically. " AL MARKAZ AS SALAFI LEICESTERSHIRE FUNDRAISING APPEAL

Help Establish a Salafi Markaz (Centre) & Place of Worship in Leicester! 

 Donation Details at the bottom of the Tweet.

 Our Goal

Alhamdulillah, the Salafi dawah has a long history in the City of Leicester, with lessons and gatherings being held for over two decades. Many people in the community have greatly benefited from these durs & halaqt and the opportunity to study the Quran and Authentic Sunnah upon the understanding of the Sahabah & Salaf (righteous predecessors).

By the permission of Allah, a venue has now been earmarked where a dedicated Salafi Markaz and place of worship can be established.

We are now seeking the support of the community to help us secure and prepare this space so that it can serve as a centre for prayer, learning, and dawah.

 What This Markaz Will Be Used For?

The aim is to establish a simple and beneficial space that will be used for:

 Regular Islamic lessons and Study Circles
 Propagating the Quran and Authentic Sunnah
 Community Gatherings for beneficial knowledge & Tawun upon Birr & Taqwa
 A place where Muslims can learn their Religion correctly
 Working towards Establishing the 5 daily prayers in Congregation

This Markaz will, in sh Allh, serve as a place of worship and learning for the local community.

 Why Your Support Matters?

Establishing a place where people can gather to learn their religion and remember Allah brings ongoing benefit to the community in this life & the next.

The Messenger of Allah  said:
When a person dies, his deeds come to an end except for three: ongoing charity, beneficial knowledge, or a righteous child who supplicates for him. (Sahih Muslim)

Helping establish a hub of ilm (knowledge) & ibdah (worship) can be a form of ongoing charity (Sadaqah Jriyah).

 How You Can Help

If you are able, you can support this effort by:

- Making a donation
- Sharing this fundraiser with others
- Making du that Allah allows this Markaz to be established

 HOW TO DONATE

"Wallahi an unforgettable journey! From Kuwait to Makkah, it was truly beautiful! and that is the same sentiment anyone who attended has. The many sittings, whether with the people of knowledge or the students of knowledge or just the many brotherly sittings over good food or coffee, the whole occasion was monumental and hugely beneficial for the soul!

It brings to mind the statement of Imm Ibnil Qayyim:

Keeping the company of the righteous transforms you from six states to six others:
1.From doubt to certainty.
2.From showing off (riy) to sincerity.
3.From heedlessness to remembrance (dhikr).
4.From desiring the worldly life to desiring the Hereafter.
5.From arrogance to humility.
6.From bad intention to genuine sincere naah.

(Ighthat al-Lahfn 1/136)

May Allah return us for many more!"

"The West must dismantle the Muslim Brotherhood in full, not just monitor it, not just debate it. Dissolve it. Shut down its networks, charities, and political fronts.

Every day the Muslim Brotherhood is allowed to operate is a day it recruits, infiltrates, and rewrites the rules from within. This is not an organization with a place in civil society. It is a threat engineered to exploit it.

The UAE labeled the Muslim Brotherhood a terrorist organization and removed it from every institution, educational, religious, financial, and civic. Jordan went even further: the Brotherhood formally dissolved itself after losing all political and legal ground. These were not gestures. They were deliberate state decisions to eliminate the roots of radicalism before they could bloom into violence.

The same clarity is needed across the West, before the same patterns take hold in new soil"

"The Salafi mashayakh in the West, such as @AbuKhadeejahSP, @AbuIyaadSP, @Abdulilah_UK, @uwaysT, @hikmahpubs, @AbuHafsahKK, @IbnAkhdar (and those with them) have acquired a profound understanding of knowledge and wisdom through their decades-long companionship with the kibaar 'ulama. This unique blend of academic excellence and spiritual guidance far surpasses the limitations of mere academic study.

In contrast, individuals who study Arabic without the benefit of guidance from the 'ulama lack the comprehensive understanding and wisdom that these mashayakh provide. It is essential to recognize the value of their guidance and to hold fast to it.

Beware of those who seek to mislead you by claiming that learning Arabic renders the guidance of these mashayakh unnecessary. Such claims are baseless and intended to divert you from the path of guidance.

Furthermore, do not heed the criticisms of those who attack @SalafiPubs and their companions, whether publicly or privately. The Da'wah at @MarkazAnas has been established under the guidance of these mashayakh, even when some troublemakers were against it, and we remain united in our commitment to the same 'Aqeedah, Manhaj, and purpose.

We are not beholden to personalities or organizations, and we reject anyone who seeks to harm the Salafi Da'wah and its callers, regardless of how much they claim to adhere to Salafiyyah. These are empty claims!"

"The Prophet  said:      (There is no marriage without the permission of the wal). Sunan Ab Dwd 2805, h (al-Albn).

Ikhwanis: Parent/guardian can be present in a marriage sit-down, but they are requested not to interfere with the sessions.

So the guardian cannot "interfere", and as to add to the humiliation, he should pay a fee to "observe", whilst his daughter is in a "rotational setting" meeting other men. He is the wal, he should be jealous over his ward and not exhibit beta-male energy.

For the people who lazily proclaim: Why do you Salafis busy yourself with refutations?

This is why. We observe nonsense like this daily and out of love for Kitb and Sunnah and love for the truth to be upheld, we speak out. This is the vigilance every Muslim should have in defending the Sunnah and uniting the people upon it.

Porting speed dating concepts into Islamic marriage meet-ups is humiliation and ignorance, adopting the methods of the disbelievers. It reminds us of the narration:

Ab Hurayrah (Allah be pleased with him) narrated that the Prophet () said: The Hour will not be established until my Ummah will take the ways of those generations (nations) that preceded them, following them handspan by handspan, cubit-length by cubit-length. They asked: O Allahs Messengers! Such as the Persians and Romans? He replied: Who else except for them. (al-Bukhr, no. 7319)

We ask Allh for safety."

"Medical Appeal for Auntie with Cancer

   

As Salaamu Aleikum

There is an auntie who my brothers Anwar (Oxford) and his cousin Zuhair (St Albans) raised money for a couple of years ago to get her a house to live in.

She is undergoing dialysis due to failing kidneys and has recently been diagnosed with cancer, she has no immediate family to help her where she lives in Settat, Morocco.

I'm looking to raise 35,000 Dirhams (~2750) for her to cover for medical costs, scans, blood tests, treatments and daily amenities. She is poor without any income, please let us try and aid her. She has reached out to Zuhair for help because she is struggling everyday.

"*Dawah Debt Appeal*

There is a brother who is a student of knowledge, actively engaged in Dawah as part of SD (San Diego) Dawah in the US.

I know the brother and his condition, he previously arranged for a Dawah center and a bookshop to be established by taking out some loans. Unfortunately, last year, the brother was hospitalised with life threatening Tuberculosis which he has now recovered from. Due to his illness and there not being many Salafis around him, he was unable to cover the costs of rent for the premises during his illness and subsequently the center was closed down. The Dawah efforts remain largely online as can be seen from the Twitter account for @SDdawah.

The brother remains in $3500 (~2800) of debt which the debtors are demanding be paid back immediately.

I'm trying to aid his situation, he is due to return to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia to complete his studies however is unable to do so at the moment due to this debt looming above his head.

Karim Al Maghribi
